select_when: External volatility is dominating attention, but the team still controls sequencing, communication, staffing, guardrails, or scope.
The next step depends on separating what is directly owned, what can be influenced, and what must be monitored rather than solved immediately.
Execution speed matters more than narrative completeness, so the work needs action buckets instead of one undifferentiated worry cloud.
The plan is stuck because people are mixing controllable levers with uncontrollable conditions.
avoid_when: The model is being used to shrink responsibility by classifying difficult stakeholder, system, or incentive problems as outside control before influence has been tested.
Local control is being optimized so narrowly that broader feedback loops or slow indirect pathways are being ignored.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on explicit agency boundaries and controllable levers rather than generic empowerment language.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor-style emotional-resilience overlays because the raw source is strongest on operational ownership splitting and control illusion failure modes.
Did not add higher-order composition fields because this batch stops at the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The source is concise and operational, so the typed input and output labels remain reviewed compression over the bucket-splitting playbook.

select_when.note: The raw strengths section gives explicit activation bullets on external volatility, ownership separation, and execution speed; review mainly compacts those into routing triggers.

avoid_when.note: The first anti-activation condition is explicit, and the second is a close operational compression of the local-control-myopia warning.

input_type.note: The raw source activates on situations where agency boundaries are blurred, but the compact type label is reviewed operational normalization.

output_type.note: The playbook explicitly produces control, influence, and monitoring buckets; the output label compresses that into a typed artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Circle of control clearly uses diagnostic classification and systems-aware reasoning, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
